info.title: Picking Service
info.description:
Streamlines and enhances the picking of products in the store or warehouse.

 **Last update**: 12 feb 26, 04:05 p. m.

tags.name: Picker
tags.description: A picker is a janis user who can pick a [Session](#tag/Session)

tags.name: picking_point
tags.description: A picking point is a warehouse where you can pick products, these warehouses may or may not be divided into [Zones](#tag/Zone)

tags.name: Preparable
tags.description: A preparable item is one that must go through a previous preparation process before starting the picking.

tags.name: Session
tags.description: A picking session is the grouping of items by one or more [Zones](#tag/Zone)

tags.name: Settings
tags.description: The picking service can have different settings grouped by entity, such as: App, Window Schema, etc.

tags.name: Wave
tags.description: Waves are groups of picking that have one or more [Picking Sessions](#tag/Session)

tags.name: window_schema
tags.description: Picking windows are ranges where you can configure their quotas, to determine the capacity of a [Picking Point](#tag/Picking-Point)

tags.name: Zone
tags.description: A zone is a group of products and / or categories that determines a place within the [Picking Point](#tag/picking_point)

tags.name: Webhooks
tags.description:
This section documents the webhook events triggered by session.

To learn more about Webhooks configuration, see the [Webhooks Documentation](https://docs.janis.im/docs/webhook)

requestBody.description:
A Zone.
---
Each zone must be composed of similar products, for example: **fruits**, **vegetables**, **frozen**, etc. This means that a category or sku can only be present in one zone.

It is the action to pick a preparable item that require preparation.

get.description: Returns all the detail of the session

put.description: Update all the detail of the session

get.description: Returns a list of all available sessions

post.description: Create a new session defining its attributes

isReadyToPick.description: Determines if the session is ready to pick

post.description: Pause a started Session

patch.description:
It's the action to pick the items that the session has. This api will only update the status of the items, not the status of the session or the quantity of the totals items picked.

To update the items and the session quantities you must use the api thats [end of the picking](#operation/sessionPick).

To be able to pick a session it must first be [started](#operation/startSession). Only users loaded as [pickers](#tag/Picker) can do it.

post.description:
It's the action to pick the items that the session has, and it can be notified when it is completed or as well as partially.

To be able to pick a session it must first be [started](#operation/startSession). Only users loaded as [pickers](#tag/Picker) can do it.

Reprocess picking session after error during original picking.

Only `picked` and complete sessions can be reprocessed.

post.summary: Assign Pickers to Orders Sessions massively
post.description: Assign Pickers to Orders Sessions massively. Batch limit: 1000

requestBody.description: The Pickers and their Orders to assigns the sessions from

get.description:
The simulation returns a json with the necessary format to be able to be used at the [end of the picking](#operation/sessionPick)

If the session simulation conditions are not met, returns a message with the detail.

post.description:
Determines the start of a picking session. Only users loaded as [pickers](#tag/Picker) can start the picking of a session.

The returned token must be used at the [end of the picking](#operation/sessionPick).

post.description: Create and assign pick sessions to items in a wave

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: This refers to the `id` of the **Wave**. See [Wave List](#operation/listWaves)

post.description: Manually lock a specific Wave

comment.description: A comment about the wave lock (optional)
comment.example: The building is closed for the day

post.description: Manually unlock a specific Wave

comment.description: A comment about the wave unlock (optional)

post.description:
Allows items associated with a wave to be rescheduled to another wave.

If the destination wave is an existing wave, it must not be complete, closed or locked.

Items must not be associated with a session or the session must not be in progress (`status` must equal `pending`) to reschedule.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: This refers to the `id` of the actual **Wave**. See [Wave List](#operation/listWaves)

requestBody.description: Wave and items need to be rescheduled.

202.description: Wave where the items were rescheduled.

id.description: The unique identifier of the wave

SessionsSortBy.name: sortBy
SessionsSortBy.description:
The field to sort by

The option `prioritizeManualAssignment` will be sort by:
  * `pickerId` => The sessions who has a picker assigned
  * `deliveryEstimateDate` => The order delivery estimate date.
  * `shippingTypePriority` => The order shipping type priority

SessionsFilters.name: filters
SessionsFilters.description: The filters to apply to the list

sessionOwnershipVisibility.description:
This filter will return the correct sessions to pick by the picker

In case the mine value is used, the filter combination will be:\
`pickerId`: `{pickerId}`\
`status`: `['pending', 'picking', 'paused']`

In the case unassigned value is used, the filter combination will be:\
`pickerId`: `null`\
`status`: `pending`

In case the mineAndUnassigned value is used, the filter combination will be:\
`pickerId`: `{pickerId}`\
`status`: `['pending', 'picking', 'paused']`\
OR\
`pickerId`: `null`\
`status`: `pending`

waveId.description: The wave id of the session

orderId.description: The order id of the session item

isLock.description: Determinate if the wave is lock

message.description: Reason why the Order was partially assigned
message.example: Picker has no access to one or more Sessions for this Order

failAssign.description: Orders that could not be assigned

message.description: Reason why the Order failed to be assigned

id.description: The unique identifier of the item

displayId.description:
It is a unique reference ID that is generated and assigned automatically when the record is created, it cannot be modified and it is structured in three parts:

- **Date**: It is the start date of the wave in the format `YYMMDD`.
- **Delimiter**: It is the character `-`.
- **String random**: It is a group of six random alphanumeric characters.

Example: `210412-MI92CT`

zoneIds.description: The wave zone IDs. This refers to the `id` of the **Zone**. See [Zone List](#operation/listZones)

zoneId.description: The unique zone identifier of the item. This refers to the `id` of the **Zone**. See [Zone List](#operation/listZones)'

skipped.description:
Indicates if an item is skipped

It is required if `pickingResult` is not passed

pickerId.description: This refers to the `id` of the **Picker**. See [Picker](/v2/service/picking#tag/Picker)

pickingPointId.description: This refers to the `id` of the **Picking Point**. See [Picking Point](/v2/service/picking#tag/picking_point)

productReferenceIds.description: The items refId that are associated to the wave

sessionIds.description: The wave session IDs. This refers to the `id` of the **Session**. See [Session List](#operation/sessionList)

dateModified.description: The date of the last modification

userModified.description: The ID of the user who last modified the item

dateCreatedRange.description: The day of creation by date range

dateModifiedRange.description: The day of last modification by date range

endPickingTimeRange.description: The day of the picking end by date range

orderDeliveryWindowDateRange.description: The delivery window date range of the order

id.description: The unique identifier of an item in a picking service

orderId.description: This refers to the `id` of the **Order** in Janis OMS Service. See [Order](v2/service/oms#tag/Order)

skuId.description: This refers to the `id` of the **SKU** in Janis Catalog Service. See [SKU](v2/service/catalog#tag/Sku)

suggestedCategoriesIds.description: The **Categories** Ids that Items is related by Suggestion

imageUrl.description: The image url of the item

imageThumbnail.description: A WEBP optimized image based on the `imageUrl` in a smaller size.

currency.description: The ISO3 Code of the items's currency

purchasedPricePerMeasurementUnit.description: The item purchased price per measurement unit

sellingMeasurementUnit.description: The **Selling Measurement Unit** of the item

sellingUnitMultiplier.description: The **Selling Unit Multiplier** of the item

isGift.description: Indicates if an item is a gift. This item will not be charged.

giftWrapQuantity.description: Indicates how many items must be wrapped as gift

manufacturerCode.description: Refers to the manufacturer code of the item

isPrepacked.description: Indicates if an item is sold as a prepacked product with variable weight

substitutionCriteria.description: The substitution criteria chosen by the customer

customerNote.description: The customer note of the item
customerNote.example: A nice comment from the customer

productGroups.description: The **Product Group** that applied to the item. See [Product Group](v2/service/catalog#tag/Product-Group)

itemCategories.description: The **Categories** that applied to the item. See [Category](v2/service/catalog#tag/Category)

commerceId.description: This refers to the `commerceId` of the **Category**

name.description: This refers to the `name` of the **Category**

id.description: This refers to the `id` of the **Product Group**

name.description: This refers to the `name` of the **Product Group**

referenceId.description: This refers to the `referenceId` of the **Product Group**

icon.description: This refers to the `icon` of the **Product Group**

itemDimension.description: The package dimensions of the item

orderId.description: The order id of the picked item

ean.description:
Package identification code.

It is required if `packageTypeId` is not passed.

packageTypeId.description:
This refers to the `id` of an **Package Type**. See [Package Type](/v2/service/packing#operation/listPackageType)

It is required if `ean` is not passed.

orderItems.description:
A list of order items picked and assigned to the package.
Is optional, but if present, its properties (id, quantity) are required.

id.description: Unique identifier for the order item. Required when orderItems is present

quantity.description: Quantity of items picked with the same EAN, related to `eanCount` in pickingResult

location.description: The location of the picked package

warehouseId.description: This refers to the `id` of an **Warehouse**. See [Warehouse](/v2/service/wms#operation/getWarehouse)

pickingResult.description:
Result of item picking. If the picking result is empty, the order item will be considered as missing.

It is required if `skipped` is not passed

id.description:
Unique identifier of the picking result, required when orderItems is present in packages.
Formed as `${item.id}-XX` (incremental number).

isCandidate.description: Indicates if an item is a candidate for the customer's final choice

isCandidateToPick.description: Indicates if an item is a candidate that must be picked after customer confirmation

price.description: The item picked price. Represents the price per unit of measure.

pricePerMeasurementUnit.description: The item picked price per measurement unit. Represents the price per unit of measure.

manufacturerCode.description: Refers to the manufacturer code of the picked item

isGift.description: Indicates if an item picked is a gift. This picked item would not be charged.

locations.description: A list of locations related to the picked item

items.description: The location related to the picked item

warehouseId.description: This refers to the `id` of an **Warehouse**. See [Warehouse](/v2/service/wms#operation/getWarehouse)

positionKey.description: Item location in warehouse. **This field will be removed soon, use `sourcePositionKey` instead**

quantity.description: Quantity of EANs picked at the related location. May match total quantity for unitary items.

totalQuantity.description: Real total picked quantity at the related location, expressed in the item's unit of measure.

omsOrderItemId.description: This refers to the `id` of item in the **Order**.

isSubstitute.description: Determine if the item picked is a substitute

quantityPerEan.description: Quantity of items picked by EAN

error.description: Error message in case the item picked cannot be processed

id.description: This refers to the `id` of the **Order**. See [Order List](/v2/service/oms#operation/listOrder)

type.description: This refers to the **Shipping-Type** `code` of the **Carrier**. See [Shipping-Type](/v2/service/delivery#tag/Shipping-Type)

deliveryWindow.description: The time window to deliver the items

initialDate.description: The initial date of the delivery

finalDate.description: The final date of the delivery

deliveryEstimateDate.description: An estimate of when the items will be delivered

companyName.description: The company that will deliver the items

warehouseReferenceId.description: The Reference ID of the shipping

paymentSystemName.description: The name of the payment system.

customerNote.description: This is a note that the customer has added to the order.

addNewItems.description: Indicates whether or not to allow the addition of new items

incrementItems.description: Indicates whether or not to allow the increment of original items

pickNewItems.description: Indicates whether or not to allow the picking of new items

decrementItems.description: Indicates whether or not to allow the decrement of original items

salesChannelIds.description: The Sales Channel IDs. This refer to the `id` of the **SalesChannel** Entity. See [SalesChannels](/v2/service/commerce#tag/Sales-Channels).

OrderAddressId.description:
This refers to the `id` of the **Customer Address** Entity. See [Customer Address](/v2/service/crm#tag/Customer-Address).

It is **required** if `addressCommerceId` is not passed.

id.description: This refers to the `id` of the **Customer Address** Entity. See [Customer Address](/v2/service/crm#tag/Customer-Address)

commerceId.description:
The identifier in the commerce platform

It is **required** if `addressId` is not passed.

geolocation.description: The coordinates of the address. First element is longitude, second is latitude.

countryCode.description:
The 3-digit country code

It is **required** if `addressId` is not passed.

state.description:
The state

It is **required** if `addressId` is not passed.

streetName.description:
The street name

It is **required** if `addressId` is not passed.

streetNumber.description:
The street number

It is **required** if `addressId` is not passed.

reference.description: A reference to help finding the address

receiverName.description: The name of an authorized person to receive the order

receiverDocument.description: The document of an authorized person to receive the order

BaseItemRuleQuantityValues.description: This setting will be used to determine the item rule quantity values

mediumMin.description: This value determines the minimum quantity of items to be considered medium complexity. Must be greater than 1 and less than complexMin.

complexMin.description: This value determines the minimum quantity of items to be considered complex complexity. Must be greater than mediumMin.

pickingPoints.description: The picking points of the picker

*Optional* SalesChannel to be used instead of Order SalesChannel. This refer to the `id` of the **SalesChannel** Entity. See [SalesChannels](/v2/service/commerce#tag/Sales-Channels).

This SalesChannel is used for substitution and prices calculations.

salesChannel.description: Sales channel of the order items

items.description: The items that will be process

id.description: The Schema ID

isDefault.description: Determinates if is a default Schema or not

pickingZoneIds.description: The IDs of the [Zones](/v2/service/picking#tag/Zone) associated to the schema

sessionOwnershipVisibility.description: This setting it will be use to determinate the filter of the pending sessions to show in the app

mustInputEanToPick.description: This setting it will be use to determinate if the app has perfect picking

canSelectSession.description: This setting it will be use to determinate if the app can select sesion

barcodeType.description: This configuration is intended to select what type of barcode the app will generate

barcodeField.description: This configuration is intended to select the field to generate the Barcode

printServerCustomHeaders.description: This Configuration indicates the Headers for the Print Server

sessionSortingCriteria.description: This setting will be used to determine the sorting criteria of the session in app.

canPostponeItem.description: This setting it will be use to determinate if the app can postpone item

canSkipItem.description: This setting it will be use to determinate if the app can skip item

canUnpickItem.description: This setting it will be use to determinate if the app can unpick item

canUseLooseItem.description: This setting it will be use to determinate if the app can use loose item

canCallCustomer.description: This setting will be used to determine if the picker can call to the customer from the order detail

showCustomerInfo.description: This setting will be used to determine if in the order detail, the customer info it will be showing or not

sessionDisplayIdField.description: This setting will be used to determine the session displayId field from an order that is going to be used to show it

substitutesBehaviour.description: This setting will be used to determine the behavior of picking substitute items

substitutesBehaviourWithoutOfflineCatalo.description: This setting will be used to determine the behavior of picking without offline catalog

substituteSubstitutionCriterias.description: This setting will be used to determine substitution criterias of substitute items

substituteCandidateSubstitutionCriterias.description: This setting will be used to determine substitution criterias of substitute candidate items

canPickMoreThanOriginalQuantity.description: This setting will be used to determinate if the picker can pick more quantity than the original item

hasToConfirmMissingItem.description: This setting it will be use to determinate if the app has to confirm missing item

hasToConfirmPostponedItem.description: This setting it will be use to determinate if the app has to confirm postpone item

hasToConfirmUnpickedItem.description: This setting it will be use to determinate if the app has to confirm unpick item

hasToConfirmLooseItem.description: This setting it will be use to determinate if the app has to confirm loose item

hasToConfirmPackage.description: This setting will be used to determine if the app should confirm when an item is in a package

hasToConfirmSkippedItem.description: This setting will be used to determine if the app should confirm when an item is skipped

allItemsMustAssignToAPackage.description: This setting will be used to determine if the app should force to relate the items with the packages

add0ToEan12.description: This setting will be used to add 0 as first position of a barcode with 12 digits

mustAddPackage.description: This setting will be used to determine if the app should force add packages

useFreePicking.description: This setting will be used to determinate if the picker can pick any skus

mustRequireMotiveForMissingItems.description: This setting will be used to determine if the app should require a motive in case of missing items

forcePrivateOfflineFiles.description: This setting will be used to force to use private urls for offline files

addInactiveProductsToSkuFile.description: This setting will be used to determine if the app should have inactive products in the offline catalog

blockManualTotalQuantity.description: This setting will be used to determine if the app should block the manual total quantity input

restrictSubstituteWithSkuSuggestions.description: This setting will be used to determine if the picker can pick substitutes with only the sku suggestions or are free to pick any sku

hideDeliveryDate.description: This setting will be used to determine if the app should hide the delivery date

maxQuantityOrders.description: This setting will be used to determine the maximum number of orders in a session

maxQuantityItems.description: This setting will be used to determine the maximum number of items in a session

canPickFutureSessions.description: This setting will be used to determine if the picker can pick future sessions

stockInSessionItems.description: This setting will be used to show stock in Session items

pickingTimePerItem.description: This setting will be used to determine the picking time per item in minutes

canAddNewItems.description: This setting will be used to determine if the picker can add new items in sessions

notifyPartialPicking.description: This setting will be used to notify partial picking

complexitySettings.description: This setting will be used to determine the complexity settings

productQuantityIsActive.description: This setting will be used to determine if the product quantity is active

productGroupQuantityIsActive.description: This setting will be used to determine if the product group quantity is active

productGroupQuantityValues.description: This setting will be used to determine the product group quantity values

productGroups.description:
This property will be used to determine the product groups that will be used to calculate the complexity.
If more than one product group is passed, items matching any of the product groups will be counted and summed to obtain the total quantity.

criteriaToComplete.description: This setting will be used to determine which criteria to use to consider that the waves are complete

priorizeWholeOrderInSessions.description: This setting will be used to determine if session should priorize whole order per session

preparableItemsOffset.description:
This setting will be used to determine the time to wait before to start generate the items that require preparation.

Time is expressed in minutes.

defaultMaxQuantityOrders.description: This setting will be used to determine the max quantity order for window schema

defaultMaxQuantityItems.description: This setting will be used to determine the max quantity items for window schema

defaultTimeBeforeClose.description: This setting will be used to determine the time in minutes before close  for window schema

scorePerformance.description: This setting will be used to determine the score performance

itemsPickedPerHourIsActive.description: This setting will be used to determine if the items picked per hour is active

itemsPickedPerHour.description: This setting will be used to determine the items picked per hour

mediumPerformance.description: This setting will be used to determine the medium performance

highPerformance.description: This setting will be used to determine the high performance

itemsFillRateIsActive.description: This setting will be used to determine if the items fill rate is active

itemsFillRate.description: This setting will be used to determine the items fill rate

mediumPerformance.description: This setting will be used to determine the medium performance

highPerformance.description: This setting will be used to determine the high performance

ord.description: The order that identify the shipping type priority

shippingTypePriorityIds.description: The shipping type priority IDs. This refers to the `id` of the **Shipping Type Priority**.

shippingTypePriorityId.description: The unique shipping type priority identifier of the item. This refers to the `id` of the **Shipping Type Priority**.'

id.description: The Window Schema ID
The Window ID

dateStart.description: The date start of the window

dateEnd.description: The date end of the window

timeStart.description: The start time of the window in hh:mm format in UTC

timeEnd.description: The end time of the window in hh:mm format in UTC

maxQuantityOrders.description: The maximum quantity items of the window

maxQuantityItems.description: The maximum quantity items of the window

timeBeforeClose.description: The time (minutes) before the window closes

id.description: The Zone ID

categoryIds.description: The category ids of the Zone. This refers to the `id` of the **Category**. See [Category List](/v2/service/catalog#operation/listCategory)

skuIds.description: The sku ids of the Zone. This refers to the `id` of the **Sku**. See [Sku List](/v2/service/catalog#operation/listSku)

maxQuantityOrders.description: Maximum order capacity for the Zone

maxQuantityItems.description: Maximum item capacity for the Zone

id.description: The Picking Point ID

locationId.description: The Location ID. This refer to the `id` of the **Location** Entity. See [Location](/v2/service/commerce#tag/Location).

distributionPriority.description: This refer to the `distributionPriority` of the **Warehouse** Entity. See [Warehouse](/v2/service/wms#tag/Warehouse).

windowSchemaId.description: The window schema ID. See [Window Schemas](#tag/window_schema)

windows.description: The Windows of the picking Point

timezone.description: The timezone name. This refers to the `name` of the **Timezone** in Janis i18n Service. See [Timezone](v2/service/i18n#operation/timezoneGet)

notSplitOrders.description: Indicates if Orders can be split in the sessions

maxQuantityOrders.description: Determine the maximum number of orders in a session

maxQuantityItems.description: Determine the maximum number of items in a session

splitByCarrier.description: The carrier options to use to separate items from orders to create sessions. Only works with windowSchemaId selected.

splitByDeliveryMethod.description: The delivery method options to use to separate items from orders to create sessions. Only works with windowSchemaId selected.

useOrderRules.description: Determine if use order rules fields

minQuantityItemsPerOrder.description: Determine the minimum number of items per order to group orders into sessions

maxQuantityItemsPerOrder.description: Determine the maximum number of items per order to group orders into sessions. Required if useOrderRules field is true.

maxQuantityOrdersPerSession.description: Determine the maximum number of orders to group into sessions. Required if useOrderRules field is true.

restrictedProductGroups.description: Determine the restricted product groups to avoid grouping orders into sessions

id.description: The id of the window of the window schemas. See [Window Schemas](#tag/window_schema)

dateStart.description: The date start of the window

dateEnd.description: The date end of the window

timeStart.description: The start time of the window in hh:mm format in UTC

timeEnd.description: The end time of the window in hh:mm format in UTC

defaultMaxQuantityOrders.description: The default maximum quantity items of the window schema

defaultMaxQuantityItems.description: The default maximum quantity items of the window schema

defaultTimeBeforeClose.description: The default time (minutes) before the window schema closes

maxQuantityOrders.description: The maximum quantity items of the window

maxQuantityItems.description: The maximum quantity items of the window

timeBeforeClose.description: Time expressed in minutes where the picking sessions will begin to be created

useOrderRules.description: Determine if use order rules fields

minQuantityItemsPerOrder.description: Determine the minimum number of items per order to group orders into sessions

maxQuantityItemsPerOrder.description: Determine the maximum number of items per order to group orders into sessions. Required if useOrderRules field is true.

maxQuantityOrdersPerSession.description: Determine the maximum number of orders to group into sessions. Required if useOrderRules field is true.

restrictedProductGroups.description: Determine the restricted product groups to avoid grouping orders into sessions

EnabledPickingZonesSchema.description:
Zones and values.
- The keys are the IDs of the ZOnes. This refer to the `id` of the [Zone](/v2/service/picking#tag/Zone) Entity.
- The values are the config defined for each zone.

ZonesSchema.description: View schema for Zones for a Picking Point

rootComponent.description: The component of the view to be rendered. Always set as 'FormSection'.

target.description: The target endpoint of the form.

targetEndpointParameters.description: The target endpoint parameters of the form.

items.description: Object containing the zone name and fields

name.description: The Zone ID. This refer to the `id` of the **Zone** Entity. See [Zone](/v2/service/picking#tag/Zone).

component.description: View component to use in the table field

items.description: Object containing the zone name and fields

isActive.description: Indicates if the zone is active or not

isPreparable.description: Indicates if the zone is preparable

startTime.description:
Preparation start time.

Added when preparable item preparation starts. See [Preparable Start](#operation/sessionStart)

endTime.description:
Preparation end time.

Added when preparable item is picked. See [Preparable Pick](#operation/preparablePick)

isLabelGenerated.description: Indicates if the label for the Preparable Item has been generated

preparableWave.description: The wave of the preparable item

id.description: This refers to the `id` of the **Wave**. See [Wave List](#operation/listWaves)

preparableSession.description: The session of the preparable item

id.description: This refers to the `id` of the **Session**. See [Session List](#operation/sessionList)

preparableItemId.description: The unique identifier of the order item

link.description: The link for the preparable label document

orderIds.description: The order Ids of the items

totalProducts.description: The quantity of products in the session

totalItems.description: The quantity of items in the session

totalProductsPicked.description: The quantity of products picked in the session

totalItemsPicked.description: The quantity of items picked in the session

totalItemsMissing.description: The quantity of items missing in the session

totalProductsSubstitutes.description: The quantity of Products substitutes in the session

totalItemsSubstitutes.description: The quantity of items substitutes in the session

totalProductsMissing.description: The quantity of Products missing in the session

isPerfectSession.description: Indicates if the Session is picked perfect (no substitutes and no missing items)

substitutionsCriteria.description: The list of every substitutions criteria in the session

complete.description: Determinates if the session is complete

startPausedTime.description: The start time of the Session is on "paused" status

finish.description: The finish of a pause interval

id.description: This refers to the `id` of the **Wave**. See [Wave List](#operation/listWaves)

pickingPoint.description: The picking Point of the session

id.description: This refers to the `id` of the **Picking Point**. See [Picking Point List](#operation/listPickingPoints)

referenceId.description: This refers to the `referenceId` of the **Picking Point**. See [Picking Point List](#operation/listPickingPoints)

pickingPointId.description: This refers to the `id` of the **Picking Point**. See [Picking Point List](#operation/listPickingPoints)

productGroups.description: The **Product Groups** of the session items. See [Product Group](v2/service/catalog#tag/Product-Group)

sorted.description: Determinate if the session is sorted

isReadyToPick.description: Determinate if the session is ready to pick

hasItemsRepicked.description: The session has items repicked or not. In case the `items` field is not requested, the field will not be returned.

hasItemsSkipped.description: The session has items skipped or not. In case the `items` field is not requested, the field will not be returned.

hasItemsCandidate.description: The session has items candidate or not. In case the `items` field is not requested, the field will not be returned.

isPrioritySession.description: Determinate if the session is a priority session

estimatedPickingTime.description: Determinates the estimated picking time of all items in milliseconds

estimatedPickingTimeRemaining.description: Determinates the estimated picking time remaining of pending items in milliseconds. In case the `items` field is not requested, the field will not be returned.

complexityTag.description: Determinates the complexity of the session

complexityDetails.description: Determines the complexities that matched with the session

rule.description: The complexity rule that matched with the session

productGroups.description: The product groups that matches with the complexity rule. See [Product Group](v2/service/catalog#tag/Product-Group)

token.description: The token of the session. It will be generate when a [picker](#tag/Picker) [start a session](#operation/startSession)

items.description:
The items of the session
- To use the new items you must have the session.canAddNewItems setting active

SessionPickedItem.description: A picked item of the session

SessionPickedNewItem.description: A picked new item of the session

isNewItem.description: Indicates if the item is new

omsOrderItemId.description: This refers to the `id` of item in the **Order**.

locationId.description: The ID of the Shipping Location

warehouseId.description: The ID of the Shipping Warehouse

dispatchDate.description: The estimated date on which the order would be dispatched to the carrier

MissingItemsMotive.description: Indicates the motive for missing items

refId.description: This refers to the `refId` of a **Motive**. See [Motive](/v2/service/management#tag/Motive)

name.description: This refers to the `name` of a **Motive**. See [Motive](/v2/service/management#tag/Motive)

omsOrderItemId.description: This refers to the `id` of item in the **Order**.

repicked.description: The item is repicked or not

isSkipped.description: The item was skipped or not in a previous Session

candidate.description: The item is candidate or not

stock.description:
The item's available stock
- Only available when requests are from App
- The Session Setting `stockInSessionItems` must be enabled

**Note:** Stock will be get from WMS Service and catched for Sku and Warehouse, therefore, the value **won't** be the real time one.

stockMessage.description:
The item's stock error message
- In case of using `stock` field, if there was an error trying to fetch item's stock, the error message will be saved in this field.
stockMessage.example: Failed to get stock from WMS Service

pickingRoute.description: The items of the session sorted to pick

requiredLabels.description: Indicates if there are required labels configured

missingRequiredLabel.description: Indicates if any required label is missing

OrderLabelsLinks.description: Links to the labels found for an Order

order.description: ID of the Order associated to the Link

orderItemId.description: This refers to `id` of session item

position.description:
Position of the item in the warehouse.

> It is only present whenever the item has availability in some position.

storedGoodId.description: The Stored Good ID. This refer to the `id` of the [Stored Good](/v2/service/wms#tag/Stored-Good) Entity.

positionId.description: The Position ID. This refer to the `id` of the [Position](/v2/service/wms#tag/Position) Entity.

positionKey.description: This refers to the `positionKey` of the **Position** in **Janis WMS Service**. See [WMS](/v2/service/wms#tag/Position).

batch.description: The batch code of the item

elaborationDate.description: The elaboration date of the item

expirationDate.description: The date of expiration of the item

SessionPickerBatchItem.description: Picker and the Order to assign the sessions from

windowId.description: This refers to the `id` of the **Window**. See [Wave List](#operation/listWaves)

timeBeforeClose.description: The Wave time expressed in minutes where the picking sessions will begin to be created

totalProducts.description: Quantity of products in the wave. Represents the sum of unique SKUs in each order

totalItems.description: Quantity of items in the wave. Represents the sum of all the quantities of the SKUs in each order

totalProductsPicked.description: Quantity of products that were picked on the wave

totalItemsPicked.description: Quantity of items that were picked on the wave

totalItemsMissing.description: Quantity of items that were not picked in the wave

complete.description: Determinates if the wave is complete

ordersIds.description: The Orders IDs associated to the wave

estimatedPickingTime.description: Determinates the estimated picking time of all items in minutes

pickersDemand.description: Indicates the number of pickers needed for session picking.

percentItemsWithoutStock.description: Percentage of items out of stock

omsOrderItemId.description: This refers to the `id` of item in the **Order**.

sessionId.description: The session id of the item

isReadyToPick.description: The item is ready to be picked or not

repicked.description: The item is repicked or not

sessionId.description: The session id of the item

isReadyToPick.description: The item is ready to be picked or not

repicked.description: The item is repicked or not

candidate.description: The item is candidate or not

wave.description:
Wave data where the items will be rescheduled.

When the wave ID is not passed, it will try to create a wave with the sent data.

itemIds.description: List of items IDs to reschedule

WaveRescheduleItemsWithWaveId.title: With Wave ID
WaveRescheduleItemsWithWaveId.description: The wave ID to reschedule items

id.description: This refers to the `id` of the **Wave** of destiny. See [Wave List](#operation/listWaves).

WaveRescheduleItemsWithoutWaveId.title: Without Wave ID
WaveRescheduleItemsWithoutWaveId.description: The wave configuration to reschedule items

pickingPointId.description: This refers to the id of the **Picking Point**. See [Wave List](#operation/listWaves).

windowId.description: This refers to the id of the **Window**. See [Wave List](#operation/listWaves).

itemsCount.description: Quantity of items in the wave. Represents the sum of all the quantities of the SKUs in each order

itemsPending.description: Quantity of items that are pending to pick in a Session

itemsPicking.description: Quantity of items that are being pick in a Session

itemsPicked.description: Quantity of items that were picked on the wave (the Session is over)

productsCount.description: Quantity of products in the wave. Represents the sum of all SKUs in the wave not matter the quantity

productsPending.description: Quantity of products that are pending to pick in a Session

productsPicking.description: Quantity of products that are being pick in a Session

productsPicked.description: Quantity of products that were picked on the wave (the Session is over)

sessionCount.description: Quantity of Session associated to the Wave

sessionPending.description: Quantity of Session associated to the Wave, pending to start

sessionPicking.description: Quantity of Session associated to the Wave, that are in progress

sessionPicked.description: Quantity of Session associated to the Wave, that are over

ordersCount.description: Quantity of Orders associated to the Wave

ordersPending.description: Quantity of Orders associated to the Wave, that has items pending to start and any item, in a picking Session

ordersInProgress.description: Quantity of Orders associated to the Wave, that has items in a picking Session

ordersFinished.description: Quantity of Orders associated to the Wave, that has all the items picked

WaveLock.description: Provide the information about the lock of a wave

isLock.description: Indicates whether the wave is lock or not

reason.description:
The reason of the lock. It can be:
- `orderLimitReached`: Max amount of Order reached.
- `itemLimitReached`: Max amount of items reached.
- `closingTimeReached`: Closing time reached.
- `manual`: The wave was locked manually.

WaveNextWave.description: Provide the information about where the items has been moved after this Wave was closed

id.description: This refers to the id of the **Wave** where the items has been moved. See [Wave List](#operation/listWaves).

displayId.description: This refers to the display ID of the **Wave** where the items has been moved. See [Wave List](#operation/listWaves).

id.description: The event related entity ID

post.description: The session ready for pick
